info.name: AI Marketplace — BPP (Provider Portal)
info.description:
Provider-facing actions: publish your AI agents to the marketplace.

## Quick Start
1. Edit the collection variables (click the collection → Variables tab)
2. Click 'publish single agent' → Send
3. Verify with 'list agents'

Target: bpp-api at http://localhost:3002

exec: // Save the agent ID for later use in BAP select/init/confirm

request.description:
Publish a single AI agent. Edit the Variables tab to configure your agent, then click Send.

The agent will be:
1. Saved/updated in the marketplace database
2. Published to Fabric catalog (discoverable by BAPs)

body.raw:
{
  "agents": [
    {
      "category_id": "AI-SUMMARIZATION",
      "category_display_name": { "en": "Document Summarizer", "es": "Resumen de Documentos" },
      "provider_subscriber_id": "neuralspark-ai.beckn",
      "provider_bpp_uri": "https://api.neuralspark.ai",
      "provider_public_key": "ed25519_pub_key_neuralspark",
      "agent_name": { "en": "DocSummarizer Pro" },
      "access_point_url": "https://api.neuralspark.ai/v1/summarize",
      "interaction_type": "sync",
      "version": "1.0.0",
      "capabilities": ["summarization", "bullet-points", "executive-summary"],
      "input_schema": { "type": "object", "properties": { "text": { "type": "string" } } },
      "output_schema": { "type": "object", "properties": { "summary": { "type": "string" } } },
      "pricing_model": { "type": "per_request", "value": 0.05, "currency": "USD" }
    },
    {
      "category_id": "AI-EXTRACTION",
      "category_display_name": { "en": "Data Extraction", "es": "Extracción de Datos" },
      "provider_subscriber_id": "neuralspark-ai.beckn",
      "provider_bpp_uri": "https://api.neuralspark.ai",
      "provider_public_key": "ed25519_pub_key_neuralspark",
      "agent_name": { "en": "DataExtract Engine" },
      "access_point_url": "https://api.neuralspark.ai/v1/extract",
      "interaction_type": "sync",
      "version": "1.0.0",
      "capabilities": ["extraction", "json-output", "entity-recognition"],
      "input_schema": { "type": "object", "properties": { "text": { "type": "string" } } },
      "output_schema": { "type": "object", "properties": { "entities": { "type": "array" } } },
      "pricing_model": { "type": "per_request", "value": 0.08, "currency": "USD" }
    },
    {
      "category_id": "AI-TRANSLATION",
      "category_display_name": { "en": "Translation", "es": "Traducción" },
      "provider_subscriber_id": "lingualab.beckn",
      "provider_bpp_uri": "https://api.lingualab.io",
      "provider_public_key": "ed25519_pub_key_lingualab",
      "agent_name": { "en": "PolyLang Translator" },
      "access_point_url": "https://api.lingualab.io/v1/translate",
      "interaction_type": "sync",
      "version": "1.0.0",
      "capabilities": ["translation", "multi-language", "context-aware"],
      "input_schema": { "type": "object", "properties": { "text": { "type": "string" }, "target_lang": { "type": "string" } } },
      "output_schema": { "type": "object", "properties": { "translated": { "type": "string" } } },
      "pricing_model": { "type": "per_request", "value": 0.03, "currency": "USD" }
    },
    {
      "category_id": "AI-CODE-GENERATION",
      "category_display_name": { "en": "Code Generation", "es": "Generación de Código" },
      "provider_subscriber_id": "lingualab.beckn",
      "provider_bpp_uri": "https://api.lingualab.io",
      "provider_public_key": "ed25519_pub_key_lingualab",
      "agent_name": { "en": "CodeAssist AI" },
      "access_point_url": "https://api.lingualab.io/v1/codegen",
      "interaction_type": "sync",
      "version": "1.0.0",
      "capabilities": ["code-generation", "debugging", "refactoring"],
      "input_schema": { "type": "object", "properties": { "prompt": { "type": "string" }, "language": { "type": "string" } } },
      "output_schema": { "type": "object", "properties": { "code": { "type": "string" } } },
      "pricing_model": { "type": "per_request", "value": 0.10, "currency": "USD" }
    }
  ]
}

request.description: Publish multiple agents at once. Edit the body directly to add/remove agents.
List all agents in the marketplace database. Use after publish to verify your agents were registered.
List all transactions (select/init/confirm activity from BAPs).

variable.description: Your Beckn subscriber ID (unique per company)
Category ID (AI-SUMMARIZATION, AI-EXTRACTION, AI-TRANSLATION, AI-CODE-GENERATION, or create new)
Auto-filled after publish — use in BAP collection
